name: hono-desktop
description: Portable compute provider — web UI + ATProto OAuth + market bidder

port.description: Port to bind HTTP server (0 = random)

storage-dir.description: Directory for key storage and session persistence

oauth-redirect-uri.description: OAuth redirect URI (loopback or custom URL scheme)

dispatcher-host.description: XRPC relay dispatcher host for market bidder

plc-directory-url.description: PLC directory URL for DID resolution

offering-refresh-sec.description: Seconds between offering record re-commits (0 to disable)

start-bidder.description: Start market bidder immediately (headless, no OAuth)

private-key-hex.description: Secp256k1 private key hex for market bidder identity (headless mode)
